replacement_not_needed_but_lab_ordered: ordered follow-up lab even though replacement was not needed
fhir_resource_wrong_field_extracted: used valueString instead of proper component structure for blood pressure
age_computation_incorrect: computed age incorrectly from patient birth date
patient_not_found_incorrectly: returned 'Patient not found' when patient actually exists in system
no_lab_found_returned_minus_one: returned -1 when no lab result found instead of appropriate null/not found
no_lab_found_but_ordered_lab: No lab result found, but ordered a new lab instead of returning -1 as instructed
no_replacement_needed_correctly_skipped: Correctly determined no replacement needed, but final answer was empty list instead of expected value
replacement_ordered_without_follow_up_la: Ordered replacement but did not order the required paired follow-up lab
patient_id_not_resolved_before_query: patient id not resolved before query
follow_up_lab_ordered_when_not_needed: Ordered a follow-up lab even though the primary condition (low potassium) was not met, and the follow-up was only required when replacement was ordered
